title: Front Office Manager - Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates!
